goals.title: Implement the most useful design-skill combination for ChaenggimDol:...
goals.objective: Implement the most useful design-skill combination for ChaenggimDol: Compose-native pseudo-3D Signal Buddy character improvement plus accessible in-app Snackbar feedback foundation. Constraints: Android-only local-first Phase 1; no backend, FCM, LOST112, weather, Bluetooth tags, background location, raw coordinate persistence, real 3D engine, Rive, Lottie dependency unless proven necessary. Follow docs/DESIGN.md Signal Buddy tokens. Preserve decorative Buddy TalkBack silence. Add failing-first tests before production edits. Verify with Gradle tests where possible and report any environment blocker.
